title: Cobblestone Generator
description: Add cobblestone generator to the game.
body:
**English**

Add various cobblestone generators

*   9-slot internal buffer, can be taken out by right-clicking
*   Items will automatically output cobblestone upward to blocks with storage space

Configuration file

*   Set the output direction of the cobblestone generator
*   Enable/disable auto-output function
*   Global speed multiplier
*   Generation count and speed for each cobblestone generator
*   Special Generator Function Configuration

\=============================================

**中文**

添加各种圆石生成器

*   内部有9格缓存空间，可以右键取出
*   物品会自动像上方有储物空间的方块输出圆石

配置文件

*   设置圆石生成机的输出方向
*   是否启用自动输出功能
*   全局速度倍数
*   每个圆石生成器的生成个数和速度
*   特殊生成器功能配置
